Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 193 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 54 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. The seven hour explosion nobody could explain 43 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. Mamba-3 259 upvotes, 50 comments
  6. Ghostling 305 upvotes, 61 comments
  7. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 440 upvotes, 126 comments
  8. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 108 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. Some things just take time 366 upvotes, 125 comments
  11. Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years threatens dam, prompts evacuations 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 134 upvotes, 43 comments
  13. Molly guard in reverse 192 upvotes, 79 comments
  14. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1164 upvotes, 573 comments
  15. No evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD 22 upvotes, 5 comments
  16. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 85 upvotes, 35 comments
  17. Books of the Century by Le Monde 75 upvotes, 41 comments
  18. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 119 upvotes, 79 comments
  19. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 54 upvotes, 31 comments
  20. 404 Deno CEO not found 219 upvotes, 159 comments
  21. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 430 upvotes, 336 comments
  22. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 95 upvotes, 65 comments
  23. Senior European journalist suspended over AI-generated quotes 78 upvotes, 56 comments
  24. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 23 upvotes, 14 comments
  25. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 240 upvotes, 272 comments
  26. How we give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster 56 upvotes, 61 comments
  27. A pig's brain has been frozen with its cellular activity locked in place 74 upvotes, 95 comments
  28. Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, reduced the number of cars 193 upvotes, 281 comments
  29. How BYD got EV chargers to work almost as fast as gas pumps 77 upvotes, 115 comments
  30. Western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance 122 upvotes, 230 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
